description: Fine <=1k tasks, quadratic beyond: RunState count properties rescan all tasks per completion (called from stop_when each wakeup); _flush_node rewrites the node file scanning all node tasks on every task finish; _propagate_skips is a fixpoint loop over all tasks per scheduler iteration. Maintain incremental counters / per-node task indexes / a dirty set instead if multi-thousand-task runs become common.
title: Scheduler perf at scale: quadratic rescans past ~1k tasks
